pet_section.pet_stage_cracking_desc: Keep up the streak! Almost there...

daily_question.title: Daily Question
daily_question.locked_desc: Your answer is locked! Reveal happens when they answer.

recommended.title: Recommended
recommended.q1: What''s something I did recently that made you feel loved?
recommended.q2: If we had 48h and no responsibilities, where would we go?
recommended.q4: What''s a dream you haven''t told me about yet?

quizzes.quiz_categories_subtitle: Choose a theme and dive deep together.
quizzes.archive_subtitle: All the questions you''ve answered together.

daily_questions.q1: What is something I did recently that made you feel truly loved?
daily_questions.q2: If we teleported anywhere right now for a 24-hour date, where to?
daily_questions.q3: What''s one thing you are looking forward to doing with me?
daily_questions.q4: What''s a small stressful thing in your life I could help with right now?
daily_questions.q5: What''s your favorite memory of our first month together?
daily_questions.q6: If you had to describe my personality as a color, what would it be?
daily_questions.q7: What is a habit of mine that you secretly find adorable?

profile.title: Profile
profile.unlink_confirm_desc: This will remove your partner connection. Your data will remain.
profile.delete_confirm_desc: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.

paywall.revive_desc: Use a free revive to restore your streak
